key.name: panel-label-mode
key.summary: Which metric to show in the panel (single-label mode)
key.description: Used only when panel-layout is 'single'. Options: combined (worst-case 5h / 7d across both providers), min, claude-session, claude-weekly, codex-session, codex-weekly

key.name: panel-layout
key.description: 'per-provider' shows each provider's icon plus 5h and 7d percentages. 'single' falls back to the legacy single-percentage display controlled by panel-label-mode.

key.name: panel-colorize
key.summary: Color the panel percentages by remaining %
key.description: When true, panel percentages render green above 50% and smoothly fade through yellow to red as remaining drops below 50%.

key.name: claude-icon
key.summary: Which Claude icon to show in the panel
key.description: 'star' uses the Anthropic Claude starburst mark. 'code' uses the Claude Code bracketed-dots mark.

key.name: show-claude-fable
key.description: When true, adds a "Fable" usage row to the Claude section of the popup and enables the Claude Fable metric for the single-label panel. Reads the model-scoped weekly limit whose model display name is "Fable".

key.name: icon-style
key.description: 'color' uses brand colors. 'mono' uses a single panel-friendly grey (#cdd6f4) so the icons blend with the rest of the GNOME top bar.
